name: LendNation
description_short: Goodlettsville, TN's LendNation storefront at 601 S Main St B provides fast payday and title loans.
description_long:
Located at 601 S Main St B in Goodlettsville, TN, the LendNation storefront sits on Main Street in the downtown area. Open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM and Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM, this location serves Goodlettsville residents with convenient hours for urgent financial needs.

This location in Goodlettsville specializes in payday loans and title loans, offering rapid cash when you need it most. Call 615-859-4094 to discuss loan options, eligibility requirements, and estimated processing times with branch staff.

As a Goodlettsville resident seeking quick cash, bring your valid ID, proof of income, and bank account information to speed up your application. LendNation handles approvals efficiently, often delivering funds within hours of acceptance.
address: 601 S Main St B, Goodlettsville, TN 37072

company_info.headquarters: 601 S Main St B, Goodlettsville, TN 37072

pros: Instant funding available via debit card and same-day cash disbursement options
Flexible repayment structures including multi-pay loans up to 36 months, not just single-payment payday loans
Title loans allow borrowers to retain vehicle use while borrowing against equity
200+ locations across 11 states provides geographic accessibility
4.8/5 Google rating from 161 reviews indicates consistent customer satisfaction
Online application available in addition to in-store application
Multiple money services (check cashing, direct deposit, mobile banking cards) beyond lending
Long-established location (since 2005) with local market presence
cons: No APR, fee, or rate information disclosed on website; rates typical of payday/title loan industry are substantially higher than traditional lending
Single-payment payday loans ($100-$1,000) designed for short-term use carry high rollover and debt-trap risks
Title loans require placing lien on vehicle, risking vehicle repossession if unable to repay
Limited to 11 states; not nationally available
Physical store hours restrict access compared to purely online lenders (closed Sundays, limited Saturday hours)
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$1,000 for immediate unexpected expenses with no other emergency funds access
Borrowers with vehicle equity seeking longer-term installment loans (up to 36 months) with potential lower rates than payday alternatives
Unbanked or underbanked individuals in the 11-state service area who need check cashing, money orders, or direct deposit services
Consumers who prefer in-person lending interaction and approval process over fully online lenders
diagnosis: LendNation is appropriate for consumers in their 11-state service area who need immediate cash ($100-$1,000) with same-day access and lack alternative options like credit unions, employer advances, or CDFIs. The main caveat is that payday and title loans carry high costs and rollover risks typical of the industry; borrowers should view these as emergency-only products and exhaust alternatives including community development financial institutions, credit union PALs, and employer wage advance programs first.
services: Payday loans ($100-$1,000 short-term loans due around next payday)
Multi-pay payday loans (installment-style repayment bi-weekly, semi-monthly, or monthly up to 36 months)
Title installment loans (secured by vehicle equity with set scheduled payments)
Title loans (multiple vehicle types: cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, ATVs, RVs by state)
Online loan applications with instant pre-approval decisions
Customer service via phone, in-store, or online form submission
meta_description: Goodlettsville, TN LendNation at 601 S Main St B. Fast payday and title loans, open Mon-Fri 9AM-6PM, Sat 9AM-2PM. Call 615-859-4094.
